title: UD+WALS Typology
summary: Demonstrates the UD+WALS Typology dataset containing typological metadata for 186 UD languages. The notebook loads a mini subset (3 examples per dataset), parses the 3 dataset views (full typological profiles, word order prediction, UD case richness), displays them as tables, and visualizes word order distribution and case richness per language with matplotlib bar charts.
